text: (X is equal to the value staked on this treaty.) The player who broke this treaty gives control of a character they control with the highest printed cost of X or lower to the player who did not break this treaty.
name: Desertion

text: (X is equal to the value staked on this treaty.) The player who broke this treaty dishonors a character they control with the highest printed cost of X or lower.
name: Dishonorable Dealings

text: (X is equal to the value staked on this treaty.) The player who did not break this treaty draws X cards.
name: Exposed Secrets

text: (X is equal to the value staked on this treaty.) The player who broke this treaty loses X fate.
name: Falling Fortune

text: (X is equal to the value staked on this treaty.) The player who did not break this treaty gains X fate.
name: Finding a New Lord

text: (X is equal to the value staked on this treaty.) The player who broke this treaty discards X cards from their hand.
name: Forgotten Plans

text: (X is equal to the value staked on this treaty.) The player who did not break this treaty distributes X fate among characters they control.
name: Second Chances

text: (X is equal to the value staked on this treaty.) The player who broke this treaty discards a total of X fate from characters they control.
name: Sent to their Deaths

text: (X is equal to the value staked on this treaty.) The player who broke this treaty discards X attachments they control.
name: Shattered Blades

text: (X is equal to the value staked on this treaty.) The player who broke this treaty bows a character they control with the highest printed cost of X or lower.
name: Spreading Discontent

text: (X is equal to the value staked on this treaty.) The player who broke this treaty loses X honor.
name: Transgression of Honor

text: (X is equal to the value staked on this treaty.) The player who did not break this treaty gains X honor.
name: Upholding Bushido

text: Interrupt: When this province is broken – resolve the effect of each ring claimed on it as if you were the attacking player.
flavorText: The fallen rider left with empty hands, having taken everything it had come for.
name: Slaughtered Village

text: Interrupt: When a province you control is broken, choose an unbroken province you control - move a ring claimed on the broken province to the chosen province.
name: Model of Courtesy

text: Interrupt: When this province is broken – move each ring claimed on it to your unclaimed ring pool.
flavorText: "What do you remember?"
name: Karmic Teachings

text: Reaction: After a province you control is revealed - redistribute the rings claimed on your provinces among eligible provinces you control.
name: Strategizing

text: Interrupt: When a province you control is broken, choose a ring claimed on that province - resolve that ring's effect as if you were the attacking player.
name: Fury of the Kami

text: Reaction: After an attack is declared against this province, choose another unbroken non-stronghold province you control - move a claimed ring from this province to the chosen province.
name: Shadowed Alleyway

text: Action: During a conflict at this province, choose 2 rings claimed on different provinces you control - move each of those rings to the other chosen ring's province.
name: Fields of the Wind

text: This province gets +2 strength for each claimed [element-water] ring. Forced Reaction: After an attack is declared against this province - place 1 fate on each unclaimed [element-water] ring.
name: Temple of Daikoku

text: This province gets +2 strength for each claimed [element-air] ring. Forced Reaction: After an attack is declared against this province - place 1 fate on each unclaimed [element-air] ring.
name: Temple of Jikoju

text: This province gets +2 strength for each claimed [element-earth] ring. Forced Reaction: After an attack is declared against this province - place 1 fate on each unclaimed [element-earth] ring.
name: Temple of Osano-wo

text: This province gets +2 strength for each claimed [element-void] ring. Forced Reaction: After an attack is declared against this province - place 1 fate on each unclaimed [element-void] ring.
name: Temple of Shinsei's Wisdom

text: This province gets +2 strength for each claimed [element-fire] ring. Forced Reaction: After an attack is declared against this province - place 1 fate on each unclaimed [element-fire] ring.
name: Temple of the Thunders

text: This character gets +2[conflict-military] and +2[conflict-political] while defending a province with 1 or more rings claimed on it.
flavorText: "I suffered the misfortune of witnessing my lord at work. Do not make my mistake."
name: Hida Secretkeeper

text: You cannot place fate on this character when it is played from your provinces. Reaction: After an opponent passes on declaring a conflict, if that opponent controls any ready characters - put 1 fate on this character.
name: One of the Forgotten

text: Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.) Action: During the conflict phase, choose another player - until the end of the phase, the next non-event card you play and the next non-event card that player plays each has its cost to play reduced by 1.
name: Sake House Smuggler

text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict as the defender - your opponent must return a ring from his or her claimed ring pool to the unclaimed ring pool.
flavorText: "Have you seen a soul cut off from its ki?"
name: Kuni Silencer

text: Reaction: After the fate phase begins, choose a character. Each opponent may give you 1 honor and choose a character - each player who chose a character in this way moves 1 fate from their fate pool to their chosen character, if able.
name: Roadside Inn

text: Interrupt: When this character leaves play, choose a player. Each opponent may give you 1 honor and choose a player - each chosen player discards 1 card from their hand.
flavorText: "I wish to see the leaves of Ide-sama's garden before they begin to fall. The regent's business with me can wait." - Kakita Yoshi
name: Chancellor's Aide

text: Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-military] duel against a character your opponent controls of their choice - resolve the duel. The controller of the duel's loser cannot claim rings during this conflict.
flavorText: "If you were so wise you would not have challenged me."
name: Dazzling Duelist

text: Action: Choose another player - that player gains control of this character and cannot trigger this ability this round.
flavorText: One with impeccable courtesy can indulge extravagant tastes.
name: Perfect Guest

text: Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.) Action: Choose any number of players - each of those players reveals the top card of their conflict deck. Until the end of the phase, each of those players may play their revealed card as if it were in their hand.
name: Masterpiece Painter

text: Action: In turn order each opponent may select 1 or more of the following - - draw 1 card. - choose and ready a character. - gain 1 fate. Then, you do each option once for each opponent that selected that option.
name: Negotiation Table

text: Action: If you have claimed the [element-water] ring, choose an attachment in your discard pile - play that attachment on this character (paying all costs).
flavorText: "When you understand the path of the sword, your adversary can do nothing you cannot forsee." - Mirumoto's Niten
name: Inventive Mirumoto

text: Action: Choose a character. Each opponent may give you 1 honor and choose a character - each player that chose a character discards the top card of their conflict deck. Each attachment a player discards this way is put into play attached to the character that player chose.
name: Agasha Prodigy

text: While you have claimed the [element-earth] ring, this character cannot lose fate or be discarded outside the fate phase.
flavorText: "Be as the mountain: unyielding of body and mind."
name: Ascetic of the North Wall

text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose a ring in your unclaimed ring pool - switch that ring with a ring claimed on one of your provinces, gaining all fate on it.
flavorText: "When the day closes and Amaterasu sleeps, what will you have learned? What difference will you have made?"
name: Mindful Warrior

text: While you have claimed the [element-fire] ring, each attachment you control on another player's character gains ancestral.
flavorText: "I have seen no interest among the fire kami for keihi bark - except when ground to paste, which seems to bring them great delight." - from the journals of Agasha Shunsen
name: Alchemical Laboratory

text: Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.) Action: For each player, choose up to 1 facedown card in that player's provinces - turn each chosen card faceup.
name: Ikoma Message Runner

text: This character gets +2[conflict-political] while attacking or defending a province with 1 or more rings claimed on it.
flavorText: She stopped at every shrine encountered, whispering prayers of penitence for the violence that her duty demanded
name: Righteous Akodo

text: Reaction: After this character is declared as an attacker in a [conflict-military] conflict, choose a character your opponent controls without covert - the chosen character must be declared as a defender in this conflict, if able.
name: Battle Aspirant

text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating character - until the end of the conflict, that character gains: "Reaction: After you resolve a ring effect during a conflict in which this character is participating, remove 1 fate from this character - resolve that effect again."
name: Medium of the Living Soul

text: Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.) Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a participating character - honor that character. Your opponent draws 1 card.
name: Bushidō Adherent

text: Reaction: After the conflict phase begins, choose a ring. Each opponent may give you 1 honor and choose a ring - during each conflict in which one of the chosen rings is contested, characters cannot enter play.
name: Expert Interpreter

text: Pride. Action: Choose another player who has claimed the [element-water] ring – that player gains control of this character.
name: Isawa Pilgrim

text: Reaction: After a player passes on declaring a conflict - draw 1 card. (Limit twice per round.)
flavorText: "Do not lose your virtue under Tengoku by thinking a katana alone puts you in the right."
name: Mediator of Hostilities

text: Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.) Action: For each opponent that has claimed the [element-void] ring, choose a facedown province that player controls - look at each chosen province.
name: Serene Seer

text:
Each opponent that has claimed
- the [element-air] ring loses 1 honor when they lose a conflict unopposed.
- the [element-earth] ring cannot claim rings that were claimed on provinces they break.
- the [element-fire] cannot put fate on character they play.
name: Hallowed Ground

text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating character – that character gets –2 glory until the end of the conflict.
flavorText: "Remember, we each wear a mask."
name: Shepherd of Visages

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a non-unique character you do not control - this character becomes a copy of that character until the end of the conflict.
flavorText: "All of life is a festival, and all are celebrants."
name: Shosuro Actor

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, dishonor it. Choose an opponent, than that opponent chooses a participating character you do not control - bow that character.
flavorText: "You know I'll always have a little something set aside for you..."
name: Vice Proprietor

text: Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.) Action: Choose a player - that player discards 3 cards from their hand and draws 3 cards.
name: Master Whisperer

text: Action: During a conflict, dishonor a (friendly) participating character and choose an unclaimed ring - switch the contested ring with the chosen ring. (The conflict retains its type.)
name: Acclaimed Geisha House

text: During each conflict against a province with 1 or more rings claimed on it, this character cannot be bowed by card or ring effects.
flavorText: When war calls she stands ready
name: Altansarnai's Vanguard

text: Action: Discard a card from your hand. Each opponent may give you 1 honor and discard a card from their hand - each player who discards a card this way draws 1 card.
flavorText: "How fascinating. You say it is used for eating?"
name: Merchant of Curiosities

text: Action: During a conflict, choose a player - move this character to the conflict on that player's side. (You still control this character, but its skill contributes towards that player's side in the conflict.)
name: Endless Plains Skirmisher

text: Limited. (No more than one limited card can be played by each player each round.) Reaction: After a province is revealed during a conflict in which this character is participating, choose an opponent - take 1 fate from that opponent.
name: Way Station Trader

text: Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.) (Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a character with printed cost 3 or lower - ready that character. If you control that character, discard 1 card from you hand.
name: Forthright Ide

text: Each card in your hand gains support. (Another player may help pay that card's fate cost.)
flavorText: Though they do not share their art often, matchmakers of the Deer Clan readily guide those in need toward fruitful and enduring partnerships.
name: Shika Matchmaker

text: While participating in a conflict against a player with more claimed rings than you, this character gets +2[conflict-political].
flavorText: "I would not share such thoughts with the court."
name: Cunning Confidant

text: While participating in a conflict against a player with more claimed rings than you, this character gets +2[conflict-military].
flavorText: "The truest path is not cut from stone or brick."
name: Insightful Gatekeeper

text: Action: Return a ring in your claimed ring pool that matches the the element of your role to the unclaimed ring pool - gain 2 fate.
flavorText: "Prune away your burdens to find your harmony."
name: Venerable Fortunist

text: Restricted. (No more than two restricted attachments per character.) X is equal to the greatest number of rings claimed by a single opponent.
flavorText: "Who needs a weapon? I am the weapon."
name: Kobo Ichi-Kai Jūjutsu

text: Action: Sacrifice a (friendly) character and choose another character - ready the chosen character. If that character is controlled by another player, honor it.
flavorText: "They may break our homes, but they will never break our spirit."
name: Common Cause

text: Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.) Reaction: After an attack is declared against a province but before the province is revealed, choose an eligible province you control - move the conflict to the chosen province and reveal it, if able. You are now the defending player if you were not already.
name: The Crashing Wave

text: Action: During a conflict, sacrifice a (friendly) character - the attacked province gets +X strength until the end of the conflict, where X is the sacrificed character's [conflict-military] skill (including modifiers).
name: Fulfill Your Duty

text: Action: During a [conflict-political] conflict, choose a participating character and a status token on a character controlled by a different player - - if you chose an honored status token, honor the chosen character. - if you chose a dishonored status token, dishonor the chosen character.
name: A Game of Letters

text: Support. Action: Set aside cards from the top of up to two conflict decks, yours and the that of the player who supports you, until X cards are set aside. Those cards are faceup and out of play. Both you and the player who supports you may play those cards as if they were in their hand.
name: Favorable Alliance

text: Action: During a conflict - until the end of the conflict, each participating character cannot be chosen as the target of an event played by a player whose honor bid is higher than that of the character's controller.
name: Cultured Façade

text: Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-political] duel between two characters controlled by different players, even if you do not control either of them - resolve the duel. Until the end of the conflict, the duel's winner does not bow as the result of conflict resolution and the duel's loser cannot be readied by card effects.
name: Return the Offense

text: While you have claimed the [element-void] ring, attached character is immune to opponents' ring effects.
flavorText: "Words of wisdom are nice, but sometimes you just need a sharpened claw."
name: Inscribed Tantō

text: Restricted. Support. Attached character gains: "Action: During a conflict, return a ring from your claimed ring pool to the unclaimed ring pool. Choose a participating character - that character gains each of this character's printed abilities until the end of the conflict."
name: Contemplative Wisdom

text: Action: If you have claimed the [element-air] ring, choose an attachment on a character you control - move that attachment to another character.
flavorText: As the farmer who had always known him stepped out of his path, the boy's vision blurred with tears. Had the whole world changed when he joined his new family?
name: Unquestioned Heritage

text: Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.) Action: During a conflict - set each character's base [conflict-military] and base [conflict-political] skills to 1 until the end of the conflict.
flavorText: If the candlelight is fire, the meal is long-cooked
name: Impossible Kōan

text: Attached character gains the Commander trait and: "Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a Bushi character you control with printed cost 2 or lower - ready that character and move it to the conflict."
name: Take Up Command

text: Action: Choose a Bushi character. Each opponent may give you 1 honor and choose a Bushi character - place 1 fate on each chosen character.
name: Called to War

text: Reaction: After the conflict phase begins - each time a player has the opportunity to declare an attack this phase, they must attack with as many of their characters as are able.
name: All Out Assault

text: Reaction: After honor dials are revealed during an honor bid - each opponent who bid higher than you cannot declare more than one conflict against you this round.
flavorText: "Welcome, Bayushi-San, to Kenson no Gakka, where we proudly remember your history..."
name: Privileged Position

text: This attachment cannot be played on an attacking character. Restricted. (No more than two restricted attachments per character.) Attached character cannot be declared as an attacker.
name: Peacemaker's Blade

text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating character - until the end of the conflict, treat that character as if its printed text box was blank (except for Traits).
flavorText: "This confirms all of my suspicions!"
name: Trick of the Light

text: Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.) Interrupt: When the effects of an event would initiate - cancel those effects and put that event on top of its owner's conflict deck.
name: Appeal to Sympathy

text: Limited. (No more than one limited card can be played by each player each round.) Action: During a conflict, the attacking player must select one - either bow each participating character they control, or discard 3 cards from their hand.
name: Ramparts of Stone

text: When you play this character, it enters play under the control of an opponent of your choice. (You may still put fate on it.) This character cannot participate in conflicts against its owner.
flavorText: "I am sorry. This was my duty."
name: Bayushi Traitor

text: Action: Lose X honor. Choose X characters - discard a status token from each of those characters.
flavorText: "Keep telling yourself that I am the one who is lying to you."
name: Imbued With Shadows

text: Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.) Action: During a [conflict-political] conflict, choose a participating character - that character gets -4[conflict-political] until the end of the conflict.
name: Compelling Testimony

text: Play only if your honor bid is higher than an opponent's. Action: Choose a character. Each opponent may give you 1 honor to choose a character - discard 1 fate from each chosen character.
name: Criminal Contacts

text: Action: You may spend 1 fate. Choose another attachment (you may only choose one an opponent controls if you spent 1 fate) - switch this attachment with the chosen attachment. If you do not control the chosen attachment, exchange control of them as well.
name: Expert Bartering

text: Action: During a conflict against a non-stronghold province, choose a participating character you do not control - move that character home and put 1 fate on it.
flavorText: "In every trade, someone must give first." - Ide Tadaji
name: Way of the Open Hand

text: Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict in which you are the attacking player, choose an eligible province not currently being attacked - bow and move home each participating character. Move the conflict to the chosen province and reveal it, if able. Move any number of ready characters you control to the conflict, then your opponent does so as well.
name: Diversionary Maneuver

text: Support. Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict choose a Cavalry character in your provinces and a player - put that character into play in the conflict on that player's side. (You still control the character, but its skill contributes towards that player's side in the conflict.)
name: Join the Fray

text: Limited. (No more than one limited card can be played by each player each round.) Action: During the draw phase, each player in turn order chooses a different character they do not control - bow each of those characters.
name: Hige's Sermon

text: Reduce the cost to play this card by 1 if you have 2 or more opponents. Reaction: After the conflict phase begins - you become the first player.
name: Seize the Day

text: Action: Resolve the effect of each ring in your claimed ring pool as if you were the attacking player. Then, if all five rings are in your claimed ring pool, you win the game.
flavorText: "The world and I are as one."
name: Enlightenment
